    org.jline.jansi.WindowsSupport
    org.jline.reader.impl.completer.FileNameCompleter

    Enum Class
    Description
    org.jline.style.StyleColor
    use Colors.rgbColor(String) instead

    Field
    Description
    org.jline.reader.impl.LineReaderImpl.TAB_WIDTH
    use LineReaderImpl.DEFAULT_TAB_WIDTH and LineReaderImpl.getTabWidth()

  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    org.jline.jansi.WindowsSupport.getErrorMessage(int)
    org.jline.jansi.WindowsSupport.getLastErrorMessage()
    org.jline.terminal.TerminalBuilder.codepage(int)
    JLine now writes Unicode output independently from the selected code page. Using this option will only make it emulate the selected code page for Terminal.input() and Terminal.output().
    org.jline.terminal.TerminalBuilder.setTerminalOverride(Terminal)
